content.en:
Ye Tian began to study the Ultimate Golden Chaos Leaf, and soon felt the preciousness of this treasure.

First of all, the Ultimate Golden Chaos Leaf contains a strange power, and comprehending this power will help improve the ultimate rule, but this is definitely not the real use of the Ultimate Golden Chaos Leaf.

He had been studying for a long time, and on this day he learned an important role of the Ultimate Golden Leaf Leaf.

That is, it can assist him in his research on the ultimate arcane!

The ultimate arcane is the manifestation of all the rules and powers in the simplest way, as if the countless dimensions are reduced to a single point, and in the way of this point, it is so simple to unleash, but the power is extremely terrifying.

If this point is transformed into countless dimensions, countless voids, and bells and whistles, it may seem to be gorgeous and powerful, but in fact, in front of that point, nothing is worth mentioning.

The move that Ye Tian comprehended was not really the ultimate arcane, but now with the help of the ultimate golden chaos leaf, he had the hope of perfection.

This Ultimate Golden Leaf seems to attribute all the heavens and the earth to this small leaf, it seems to be all, it seems to be everything, and it has the same principle as the ultimate arcane.

Comprehending the Ultimate Golden Leaf will naturally help you create your own ultimate arcane art.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, a large number of Ultimate Era years had passed.

this day.

Lin Tian finally perfected the Sky Tearing Move, perfecting this move into a true ultimate arcane art.

At the same time, his several ultimate rule realms also skyrocketed significantly, and the fastest improved of them was the Demon Hell Ultimate Rule.

The main thing is that one of his replica bodies stays in the ultimate demon hell, with the help of many treasures, and the effect of comprehending the ultimate rules of the demon hell is the best, and with the help of this piece of ultimate golden chaos leaf, the ultimate rules of the demon hell are naturally skyrocketing.

Now, his Demon Hell Ultimate Rule had been raised to the thirty-nine realm.

Although this realm is not high among the Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, his cultivation time is short, and compared to those Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, the years of his cultivation are simply not even a fraction of a fraction.

As long as he is given enough time, his Hell's ultimate rules will be raised to an extremely high level.

In the years that followed, tens of thousands of years of the Ultimate Era passed.

Ye Tian also focused on comprehending the ultimate rules of the Demon Hell, and gradually reduced the time for comprehension of other ultimate rules.

Finally, his Demon Hell Ultimate Rule was raised to above the One Hundred Realm, and the Demon Hell Ultimate Body had also reached the Dacheng Realm, and his strength had naturally improved a lot.

Now, with the Ultimate Arcane, his strength should be invincible among the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lords.

Of course, compared to the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord, he was still very weak.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian continued to cultivate, regardless of the outside world.

But he also knew that the outside world was now chaotic again, countless forces were desperately fighting with each other, and countless servants and soldiers had fallen and died, and were absorbed by the ultimate land.

Ye Tian also secretly investigated, and found that the driving forces in the secret were those Eternal Ultimate Realm Lords, who dominated everything, and even sacrificed the strong people under their command.

this day.

Ye Tian befriended an ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord-Lin Turtle Extreme Lord, this is a very ancient Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord, who has lived for a long time, and is good at defense, and is good at the art of clone, no one knows where his deity is.

Therefore, Lin Gui Jizun has always been alive.

And from the mouth of this Lin Turtle Jizun, he also learned a truth.

"Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, the Ultimate Land has been so chaotic recently, and there are even many ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters who have fallen in one treasure land and inheritance land, all because the Ultimate Tribulation of the Ultimate Land is coming, and those Eternal Ultimate Realm Masters are afraid of being affected by the Ultimate Tribulation, so they want to sacrifice those Grand-level and Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters. Lin Gu Jizun said.

"Lin Turtle Extreme Venerable, what is the ultimate calamity?"

Ye Tian asked.

Lin Gu Jizun explained: "The ultimate catastrophe is that the energy of the ultimate land itself is not enough to support the stable operation of the ultimate land, so it needs to absorb energy, and absorbing a lot of energy from the outside world will release a special power to make the internal creatures kill each other, and then absorb the energy of the fall of these internal creatures. Therefore, every time the Ultimate Tribulation really broke out, many Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters would die. Therefore, those Eternal Ultimate Realm Masters hoped that there would be more Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters and Hao Ultimate Realm Masters, so that the Ultimate Tribulation would end directly. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood, no wonder the Doomsday Extreme Inheritance Land was opened, facing all the Mighty-level Ultimate Realm Lords and Ancient Ultimate Realm Lords, it turned out that those Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lords deliberately did it, hoping to sacrifice a large number of Giant-level and Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords.

And they did it, but not all of the ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords and Hao-level Ultimate Realm Masters came, only some of them came, and they still didn't let the Ultimate Tribulation dissipate.

Therefore, they began to continuously let many forces kill each other, sacrificing the countless servant-level and soldier-level Ultimate Realm Masters, which could also delay the ultimate tribulation.

"Can't the Ultimate Extremities solve the Ultimate Tribulation?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Perhaps, but why would the Ultimate Extremity want to stop it?" asked the Turtle Extremity.

That's right, too.

The Ultimate Extreme Masters are at ease, why should they stop the Ultimate Tribulation, it doesn't seem to be beneficial to them, there is no need to stop it, maybe they forcibly stop it, and they will have to pay some price.

Therefore, the Ultimate Extreme Venerable will not care at all.

Ye Tian looked at Lin Gu Ji Zun, Lin Gu Ji Zun knew so clearly, he must have experienced more than one ultimate catastrophe, and it was really amazing that the other party could survive (Qian Li's).

The capital of fire and slaughter.

Now.

An ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord with a hidden identity suddenly attacked the Mansion of the Flame Killing Capital, killing many soldiers, heroes, and an Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord here.

Then, the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord quickly fled.

Soon.

A terrifying figure tore through the ultimate void and descended on the pine.

"Damn, who the hell is it?"

The Flame Killing Extreme Venerable was furious.

As an Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lord, his strength is not weak at all, this time he went to participate in an Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lord meeting, and only as a result of participating in it, his Flame Killing Capital was attacked, and all his own people were killed.

It was obvious that he was aware of his whereabouts, and that he had done so on purpose.

"It's definitely from some ancient level Ultimate Realm master, I must kill him!!"

Yan Kill Jizun said angrily.
